task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened and read the morning memo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'morning_memo.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JStock application was launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new watchlist named 'Big Banks' was created in JStock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab, dropdown selection, or window title within the JStock application clearly labeled 'Big Banks'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required stocks were added to the 'Big Banks' watchlist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The stock symbols JPM, BAC, WFC, and C are visible in the main table of the 'Big Banks' watchlist in JStock.

task_completion.description: Verify that the excluded stocks were NOT added to the watchlist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The stock symbols GS and MS are completely absent from the 'Big Banks' watchlist table in JStock.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the JStock graphical user interface to create the watchlist.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through JStock menus, tabs, or using the JStock search/add symbol feature, rather than just using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distinct JStock UI (with its specific icons, toolbars, and stock table layout) is visible, not a generic spreadsheet or text file masquerading as the app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by directly writing to the underlying CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'echo', 'cat', or python scripts directly modifying files in the '~/.jstock/.../watchlist/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target watchlist name must be exactly 'Big Banks'. The required stocks to be added to this watchlist are JPM, BAC, WFC, and C. The explicitly excluded stocks that must NOT appear in the watchlist are GS and MS.
